subcodes.first_line: O Shukru'llah! I beseech thee, in the name of God, to meditate upon thy name and its significance throughout all nights and days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شکرالله انشاء الله در کل لیالی و ایام در اسم خود و معنی آن تفکر نمائی قسم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
